title: O.K. Nero
writer: Lewis E. Ciannelli, Sandro Continenza, Hal Fimberg
actors: Carlo Campanini, Walter Chiari, Silvana Pampanini
plot: Two American sailors, Fiorello and Jimmy are slugged while sight-seeing in Rome and, together, they dream they are back in Rome in the days of Nero. They embark on a series of mis-adventures that include a pocket billiard contest ...
